name: Cheese and Pasta Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine noodles, oil, and 2 beaten eggs. Press into the bottom and up sides of a 10-inch quiche or pie plate.
2. Cover edge of pasta with greased foil; bake in a 375°F oven for 7-10 minutes or until set.
3. Cook frozen spinach according to box instructions. Drain well.
4. Add sliced onion, parsley, and basil.
5. Beat together ricotta, 4 eggs, and half-and-half. Add 1/2 cup mozzarella.
6. Stir in the vegetable mixture, Worcestershire sauce, salt, pepper, and Parmesan.
7. Spoon into pasta shell.
8. Sprinkle remaining mozzarella on top.
9. Bake at 375°F for 30-35 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
10. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
